meaning: n.<主美>(电视)显像管,电视屏幕纪录片(电视节目的录象)vt.电视节目录影
examples: The new kinescope has a revolving power of 800 lines.
Description of the profile of electron beam is one of the difficult points in detection of color kinescope.
Electron gun accessories of color kinescope are made of stainless steel which has high hardness and intensity.
The 1957 "Cinderella" was a live broadcast that survives thanks to a kinescope (which, along with the 1997 production, is now viewable in its entirety on YouTube).
